info.title: Legerity.Uno.PageObjectGenerator
info.description: A command line tool for auto generating page objects from Uno Platform XAML pages for UI tests using the Legerity.Uno framework

options.name: --input
options.description:
The path to the folder where platform pages exist that will
be generating page objects for. Default to the executing
folder.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The path to the folder where the generated page object
files should be stored. Default to the 'Generated' folder
in the executing folder.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
The namespace to apply to the output page objects. Default
to 'LegerityUnoTests.Pages'.
